html:
Gears are Items dropped by Clockwork Knights, Clockwork Bishops, and Clockwork Rooks. They can also be rarely found by digging up Graves and harvesting Tumbleweeds.

WX-78 can consume Gears to restore 75 Hunger, 60 Health and 50 Sanity. Prior to the WX-78 Character Rework Update, WX-78 could increase their maximum stats by consuming Gears, but this is no longer the case. Maximum stat increases are accomplished with Circuits instead.

Usage

×2

×2

×15

×2

×10

×2

×2

×3

×6

×3

Tips

  • A player can destroy the many Broken Clockworks in the Ruins to obtain them, which can yield a lot of gears. A player can also get them by defeating Damaged Knights, Damaged Bishops, and Damaged Rooks. They can also repair Broken Clockworks with 3 Gears to spawn an allied version of one of the aforementioned damaged chess monsters.
  • When the Ancient Guardian is defeated, the Large Ornate Chest has a 77% chance to contain between 3-6 Gears.
  • Gears in the Ruins are renewable, as killing the Ancient Fuelweaver regenerates the Ruins. All Broken and Damaged Clockworks and the Ancient Guardian respawn as a result.
  • If a repaired Marble Sculpture of a Rook, Knight or Bishop is mined during a full moon, the respective clockwork spawns which the player can kill for gears. If these sculptures are mined during a new moon, the gears drop immediately from mining the sculpture as the shadow piece is spawned.
  • The Twins of Terror each drop 3-5 gears (6-10 in total) and can be summoned every 15 days using the Terrarium.

Gallery

  • Gears as seen on the 2018 Valentine Cards.
ResourcesFood

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bánh răng là Vật phẩm rơi ra từ Hiệp sĩ Đồng hồ, Tượng Đồng hồ và Xe Đồng hồ. Chúng cũng hiếm khi được tìm thấy bằng cách đào Mộ và thu hoạch Cỏ Lăn.

Maximum stat increases are accomplished with [[Circuits]] instead. =={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |item2 = Gold Nugget |count2 = 2 |item3 = Cut Stone |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Ice Box}} {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |count1 = 2 |item2 = Ice |count2 = 15 |item3 = Electrical Doodad |count3 = 2 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Ice Flingomatic}} {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |count1 = 1 |item2 = Thick Fur |item3 = Electrical Doodad |count3 = 1 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Insulated Pack}} {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |item2 = Volt Goat Horn |item3 = Down Feather |count3 = 10 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Weather Pain}} {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |count1 = 1 |item2 = Boards |count2 = 2 |item3 = Rope |count3 = 1 |result = Rudder Kit |tool = Think Tank}} {{Recipe |item3 = Gold Nugget |count3 = 3 |item2 = Electrical Doodad |count2 = 2 |item1 = Gears |count1 = 1 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Gramophone}} {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |count1 = 1 |item2 = Bio Data |count2 = 6 |item3 = Acceleration Circuit |count3 = 1 |tool = Bio Scanalyzer |result = Super-Acceleration Circuit |character = WX-78}} {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |count1 = 1 |item2 = Bio Data |count2 = 3 |result = Chessmaster Circuit |tool = Bio Scanalyzer |character = WX-78 }} {{Recipe |item1 = Gears |count1 = 1 |item2 = Red Gem |count2 = 1 |result = Backup Chassis |skill = Cold Standby I |character = WX-78 }} =={{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips== * A player can destroy the many [[Broken Clockworks]] in the [[Ruins]] to obtain them, which can yield a lot of gears. A player can also get them by defeating [[Damaged Knight]]s, [[Damaged Bishop]]s, and [[Damaged Rook]]s. They can also repair [[Broken Clockworks]] with 3 Gears to spawn an allied version of one of the aforementioned damaged chess monsters. * When the [[Ancient Guardian]] is defeated, the [[Ornate_Chest#Large_Ornate_Chest|Large Ornate Chest]] has a 77% chance to contain between 3-6 Gears. * Gears in the Ruins are renewable, as killing the [[Reanimated Skeleton#Ancient Fuelweaver|Ancient Fuelweaver]] regenerates the Ruins. All Broken and Damaged Clockworks and the Ancient Guardian respawn as a result. * If a repaired [[Marble Sculptures|Marble Sculpture]] of a Rook, Knight or Bishop is mined during a [[Moon Cycle|full moon]], the respective clockwork spawns which the player can kill for gears. If these sculptures are mined during a [[Moon Cycle|new moon]], the gears drop immediately from mining the sculpture as the [[Shadow Pieces|shadow piece]] is spawned. * The [[Twins of Terror]] each drop 3-5 gears (6-10 in total) and can be summoned every 15 days using the [[Terrarium]]. == {{pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Valentines 2018 2.png|Gears as seen on the 2018 Valentine Cards.
